about.title: SOC Analyst Intern
about.description: Monitored alerts across SIEM platforms, triaged incidents, and documented investigation findings for the security operations team.

about.title: DevSecOps Intern
about.description: Integrated security scanning into CI/CD pipelines and supported the hardening of containerized workloads running on Kubernetes.

experience.title: SOC Analyst Intern
experience.description: Monitored and triaged security alerts using Wazuh and Splunk, escalated confirmed incidents through TheHive, and contributed to detection rule tuning to reduce false positives.

experience.title: DevSecOps Intern
experience.description: Built security checks into GitLab CI/CD pipelines with SonarQube and Trivy, and helped harden Kubernetes deployments using Helm and network policies.

experience.title: Network & Infrastructure Intern
experience.description: Supported network monitoring and firewall administration, gaining hands-on exposure to pfSense, intrusion detection with Suricata, and Linux system administration.

education.title: Engineering Degree — Cybersecurity Track
education.description: Coursework spanning network security, cryptography, security operations, and secure software development, with hands-on labs in SOC tooling and cloud security.

education.title: Preparatory / Foundation Studies
education.description: Foundational studies in mathematics, computer science, and systems engineering ahead of specializing in cybersecurity.
